en.title: FUD FAQ | A Weekly Community Thread | Week 57

blocks.value: FUD FAQ | A Weekly Community Thread | Week 57
Top Question of the Week
What‘s the latest in the lead up to NFT.NYC?

With the start of May finally here, the exciting end of this month and start of the Cypherpunk CC0 Streetwear Popup series is finally within sight. These first major kickoff events of the Spring run from May 31st through June 4th, and set the stage just a few short weeks later for Web3 Fashion Week, NFT.NYC, and ETHNYC all happening during the week of June 19–26th.

Having seen, and producing ourselves, a lot of what’s in store, it’s going to be a creative explosion of NFT content of all kinds, presented and shared between a wide range of people and in ways that promise a can’t miss experience. From secret drops to full immersive projection experiences and the continued ascent of Web3 music and CC0 everything to their rightful place in the NFTs pantheon. There’s so much content to be featured across the designer realms that we don’t know where to begin to tease it.
Venues and collaborators are locked in, and if you’re local, public and secret coordinates will be shared soon!
Most Common Repeat Question
Where do I find a blueprint or guide for how to move forward more actively with building up Designer Realms?
The first designer realms have already gotten off to a strong start and their corresponding custom marketplaces are already live— for both digital and physical fashion.

These inaugural realms are now set up to build actively on top of the protocol stack, and, over the coming weeks you’ll start seeing and hearing a lot more from these first key realms as they make more fully featured use of the newly updated ecosystem architecture.
They will be seen prominently throughout the Cypherpunk CC0 Streetwear Popup series at the end of May and Web3 Fashion Week in late June.

Built as composable units for any designer with enough audacity and determination to take forward and start revolutionising the fashion industry, DIGITALAX enables these first designer realms to the lead in being, designing, and minting the blueprint of how to do this, often literally, in the form of medium jumping samizdat across printed fabrics, stickers as street art, immersive projection content experiences, 3d digital models, and visual guidebooks for intrepid web3 designers looking to make their own way.
Top Controversies
I think that the top controversy this week is pretty obvious to anyone with a pulse. Good old Yuga is at it again.

In short, driving up Ethereum gas prices to insane levels deliberately is not a good guerilla marketing scheme. It’s pretty callous and shows a complete disregard for actually advancing what they “claim” to be about.
They’ve proven that they are just another VC cash grab. Good luck to the apes, the days are numbered.
Silly Fails and Trolling

The only thing stupid and evil is the parasitic economic system that Buffet and co defend, trying to distract away from their own behaviour. It’s funny how their investment thesis, when you dig into it, really boils down to shilling nonsense advice for others to follow whilst they continue to wrap up and lock down as many of the chips on the table for themselves as possible.
View all FUD FAQ here.
If you would like a question answered or contribute content to next weeks article please reach out through our DIGITALAX Discord server in #FUD-FAQ channel!
Join our Community!

ar.title: FUD FAQ | ثريد مجتمعي اسبوعي | اسبوع 57

blocks.value: FUD FAQ | ثريد مجتمعي اسبوعي | اسبوع 57
Top سؤال من ال اسبوع
What‘s ال latest في ال lead up الى NFT.NYC?

مع ال start من May finally here, ال exciting end من this month و start من ال Cypherpunk CC0 Streetwear Popup series is finally within sight. These first major kickoff events من ال Spring run من May 31st through June 4th, و set ال stage just a few short weeks later لـ Web3 فاشون اسبوع, NFT.NYC, و ETHNYC all happening during ال اسبوع من June 19–26th.

Having seen, و producing ourselves, a lot من what’s في store, it’s going الى be a ابداعي explosion من NFT content من all kinds, presented و shared between a wide range من people و في ways that promise a can’t miss experience. من secret drops الى full immersive projection experiences و ال continued ascent من Web3 music و CC0 everything الى their rightful place في ال NFTs pantheon. There’s so much content الى be featured across ال designer realms that we don’t know where الى begin الى tease it.
Venues و collaborators are locked في, و if you’re local, public و secret coordinates will be shared soon!
Most Common Repeat سؤال
Where do I find a blueprint or guide لـ ازاي الى move forward more actively مع building up Designer Realms?
ال first designer realms have already gotten off الى a strong start و their corresponding custom marketplaces are already live— لـ both ديجيتال و physical فاشون.

These inaugural realms are now set up الى build actively على top من ال بروتوكول stack, و, over ال coming weeks you’ll start seeing و hearing a lot more من these first key realms as they make more fully featured use من ال newly updated النظام architecture.
They will be seen prominently throughout ال Cypherpunk CC0 Streetwear Popup series at ال end من May و Web3 فاشون اسبوع في late June.

Built as composable units لـ any designer مع enough audacity و determination الى take forward و start revolutionising ال فاشون industry, DIGITALAX enables these first designer realms الى ال lead في being, designing, و minting ال blueprint من ازاي الى do this, often literally, في ال form من medium jumping samizdat across printed fabrics, stickers as street art, immersive projection content experiences, 3d ديجيتال models, و visual guidebooks لـ intrepid web3 designers looking الى make their own way.
أهم الجدل
I think that ال top controversy this اسبوع is pretty obvious الى anyone مع a pulse. Good old Yuga is at it again.

في short, driving up Ethereum gas prices الى insane levels deliberately is not a good guerilla marketing scheme. It’s pretty callous و shows a complete disregard لـ actually advancing what they “claim” الى be about.
They’ve proven that they are just another VC cash grab. Good luck الى ال apes, ال days are numbered.
Silly Fails و Trolling

ال only thing stupid و evil is ال parasitic economic system that Buffet و co defend, trying الى distract away من their own behaviour. It’s funny ازاي their investment thesis, when you dig into it, really boils down الى shilling nonsense advice لـ others الى follow whilst they continue الى wrap up و lock down as many من ال chips على ال table لـ themselves as possible.
